name: Shenzhen Kaizhong Precision Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Kaizhong Precision Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of various commutators, slip rings, and connectors in China and internationally. The company offers elastic parts, automotive lightweight parts, precise tools, intelligent equipment, and multi-layer insulated wires, as well as busbars. Its products are used in various applications, including automotive, household appliances, power tools, office automation, aviation and aerospace, intelligent home furnishings, and medical instruments. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
